h135e29a0g66bbg4428g9552g66fa1c1d9850: We've lost people today. But we are alive, and the dead have bought us a chance.
hba52fa9fgbd2fg462ega437g2d9326576b8d: The greatest honour we can do them is to use it - so make yourselves ready.
h8e44e190g78b3g4190g9c2cg34b6cf4b54f8: The road waits - and beyond it, Baldur's Gate.
hcbb4e9b1g0d3bg475eg92cbg4b02302ec71a: You. I won't pretend to know why, but you've been a friend to us when we needed it most.
h395b9738g5998g4cc2g9432g9acb75e84ce0: Here. It's faint thanks compared to what you've done for us, but it's what we have.
ha3df7fabge8d7g4973g81b2g7adc55e5db30: Gods above - that's the druid. Some timing you have, Halsin.
h2edd57afgc6eeg41b0gb567ge19ba9eb1831: Go on. He'll want to speak to the one who saved his grove, I expect.
h92f0dfb4g4f89g4c9dgafcbgea87ee5487a8: All the more reason to find us when you get to the city, eh?
